The AWS CloudFormation template for this Serverless application

/Users/nithangc/Desktop/mini-project/min.serviceRawFile:
# "org" ensures this Service is used with the correct Serverless Framework Access Key.
org: nithan
app: miniproject-backend
service: miniProject-backend-service

provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: nodejs20.x
  stage: ${opt:stage, 'dev'}
  region: ${opt:region, 'ap-south-1'}
  iam:
    role:
      statements:
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - s3:PutObject
            - s3:GetObject
            - s3:DeleteObject
          Resource: "arn:aws:s3:::photo-search-event-images/*"
  httpApi:
    cors:
      allowedOrigins:
        - http://localhost:5173
      allowedHeaders:
        - Content-Type
        - Authorization
        - X-Requested-With
      allowedMethods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PATCH
        - PUT
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
      allowCredentials: false
      maxAge: 600
  environment:
    NODE_ENV: ${self:provider.stage}
    DATABASE_URL: ${env:DATABASE_URL, ''}
    REDIS_URL: ${env:REDIS_URL, ''}
    S3_BUCKET: ${env:S3_BUCKET, ''}
    JWT_ACCESS_SECRET: ${env:JWT_ACCESS_SECRET, ''}
    JWT_REFRESH_SECRET: ${env:JWT_REFRESH_SECRET, ''}
    ML_EMBEDDING_URL: ${env:ML_EMBEDDING_URL, ''}

functions:
  # Auth
  authRegister:
    handler: src/handlers/auth/register.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /auth/register
          method: post
  authLogin:
    handler: src/handlers/auth/login.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /auth/login
          method: post
  authRefresh:
    handler: src/handlers/auth/refresh.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /auth/refresh
          method: post
  authGuest:
    handler: src/handlers/auth/guest.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /auth/guest
          method: post

  # Events (organizer)
  eventsCreate:
    handler: src/handlers/events/create.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /events
          method: post
  eventsList:
    handler: src/handlers/events/list.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /events
          method: get
  eventsGet:
    handler: src/handlers/events/get.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /events/{eventId}
          method: get
  eventsUpdate:
    handler: src/handlers/events/update.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /events/{eventId}
          method: patch

  # Join (guest / attendee)
  eventsJoin:
    handler: src/handlers/events/join.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /events/join
          method: post

  # Photos (organizer)
  photosPresign:
    handler: src/handlers/photos/presign.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /events/{eventId}/photos/presign
          method: post
  photosConfirm:
    handler: src/handlers/photos/confirm.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /events/{eventId}/photos/confirm
          method: post
  photosList:
    handler: src/handlers/photos/list.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /events/{eventId}/photos
          method: get

  # Photo download (attendee)
  photosDownload:
    handler: src/handlers/photos/download.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /events/{eventId}/photos/{photoId}/download
          method: get

  # Search (attendee)
  searchFaces:
    handler: src/handlers/search/search.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /events/{eventId}/search
          method: post

plugins:
  - serverless-offline

custom:
  serverless-offline:
    httpPort: 3000
    noPrependStageInUrl: true
